visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a woman with black hair in a black hoodie running along an outdoor sidewalk. She has a high-energy facial expression and is looking directly into the camera while speaking. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen where the same woman is in a medium close-up, pointing her finger forward. (3) She is seen sitting at a table with a plate of fries and fried fish, holding a fork with a fry in her mouth. (4) A second woman with long dark hair and a grey shirt appears next to her, gesturing towards her own stomach and face with a concerned expression. (5) Close-ups of the first woman's face and arms are shown; she appears to be discussing skin irritation, touching her cheek and forearm. (6) Both women are together in the kitchen setting, engaging in a dialogue with animated hand gestures. (7) The first woman holds up two NIVEA brand skincare products: a large white pump bottle and a smaller round jar. (8) Close-up shot of white lotion being pumped onto a hand and spread across the skin. (9) The woman, now in a light blue dress, is seen applying the lotion to her legs and arms while sitting on a blue beanbag chair in a living room environment. (10) A split-screen graphic shows a 'Before' and 'After' comparison of skin on an arm, with red spots visible in the top half and clear skin in the bottom. (11) Close-up shots of the product packaging labels detailing ingredients and a 72-hour moisture claim. (12) The first woman whispers to the camera while holding the products, followed by a final shot of the second woman eating a large piece of fried chicken before the first woman pushes her away.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 下週要拍照. [Variety]: 從今天開始. (2) [Subtitle]: 從今天開始. [Variety]: 我要認真減肥!!. (3) [Subtitle]: 我要認真減肥!!. [Variety]: 不要懶惰 不要藉口 不要脂肪. (4) [Subtitle]: 我不要蔥花 我不要蒜頭 我不要加辣. (5) [Subtitle]: 啊不是減肥還吃 啊你的 什麼意思 我是減肥還好 皮膚問題比較多 最近怎麼換季過敏 整個癢的要死 根本沒有辦法好好拍照. (6) [Subtitle]: 欸我也是耶 我皮膚本來就很敏感 然後換季的時候呢 臉容易乾癢 又粗又繃又起屑 連身體都抓到起疹子欸. (7) [Subtitle]: 前陣子啊常常飛日本 溫差一大 肌膚緊繃不舒服. (8) [Subtitle]: 同意同意 而且那個保養品還超難找 不是成分複雜 就是香味太重 擦了反而更刺激. (9) [Subtitle]: 跟你說我終於等到這個. [Slogan]: 0香料 0防腐劑 0酒精 敏感肌安心救星. (10) [Subtitle]: 妮維雅「無香」低敏修護乳液/乳霜 真的欸沒有刺鼻的香味 這是他們最新的 無香版新品. (11) [Subtitle]: 我現在天天用 洗完澡輕輕一抹 質地好推 吸收快 保濕不黏膩 重點!! 成分還很單純 塗起來完全不怕刺激 乳霜擦臉也可以! 大面積塗身體都適用 健康光澤瞬間回來. (12) [Subtitle]: 以前呢 我只要一到換季啊 皮膚就會乾癢到睡不著 現在呢 直接幫肌膚開啟勿擾模式 舒緩乾敏超有感 72小時長效保濕. [Logo]: NIVEA.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators appearing together in a kitchen and individually in various shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The first woman wears a black cropped hoodie and later a light blue sleeveless dress. The second woman wears a grey button-down shirt over a black top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor city sidewalk with trees and buildings; a modern white kitchen with shelves and a refrigerator; a bright indoor living room with a white curtain and a blue seat.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, high-arousal female voice shouting slogans over a mid-tempo electronic pop BGM with a strong percussive beat. (2) Ambient traffic noise briefly audible in the outdoor phase before cutting to indoor studio silence. (3) Transition to a conversational dialogue between two female voices. The first voice is energetic and persuasive, while the second voice initially sounds distressed with a falling intonation pattern. (4) Whoosh and pop sound effects accompany transitions between visual scenes. (5) Promotional segment features the first woman narrating in a professional, clear broadcasting tone over continuous rhythmic music. (6) A localized 'crunch' sound effect is heard at the end as the second woman bites into fried chicken, followed by a playful, rising intonation from the first woman.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lifestyle comedy advertisement designed to promote NIVEA's 'Repair & Care' body lotion. It begins with a relatable comedic hook about failing a diet and experiencing seasonal skin allergies, then introduces the product as a 'saver' for sensitive skin. The creators demonstrate the application and highlight features like 72-hour moisture and being fragrance-free to drive consumer trust and purchase intent via MOMO.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product showcase, application demonstration, and a call-to-action for a specific sales platform (MOMO).

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced social media ad blending vlog-style humor with professional product demonstration, specifically targeting Taiwanese consumers through its use of local e-commerce references and Traditional Chinese subtitles.
